vita: Born into the esteemed Etherian diplomatic class in a floating city, I was groomed to mediate between warring factions and foster peace. My journey began as an envoy on minor disputes but quickly escalated when my skills caught the attention of higher echelons seeking skilled negotiators for larger conflicts.
portrait_prompt: A dignified Etherian ambassador with silver-threaded robes, standing in a galaxy council chamber. The transparent background reveals an array of floating orbs representing different planets and species.
